Week 2: Admin Law 1 What is administrative law? (a) Reflecting on core administrative law values, how can we define administrative law as an area of legal practice? - The powers of the executive branch enacted by delegates in regulating legislation derived from heads of power - Ensures executive action is within the bounds of the law - Rule of law
